test.name: Testar Login

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
No browser and context was open. New browser and context was automatically opened when page is created.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=form at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'tomsmith' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'SuperSecretPassword!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg:
Error: locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Login') resolved to 2 elements: 1)

Login Page

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'Login Page' }) 2) Login aka getByRole('button', { name: ' Login' }) Call log: - waiting for locator('text=Login')
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.status:
Error: locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Login') resolved to 2 elements: 1)

Login Page

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'Login Page' }) 2) Login aka getByRole('button', { name: ' Login' }) Call log: - waiting for locator('text=Login')

kw.name: Wait For Response
kw.doc: Waits for response matching matcher and returns the response as robot dict.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.
